name: P0 Deepest Comprehensive Runtime Closure
goal: Push P0 as deep as the current environment allows without claiming public/production readiness before Node24 CI and hosted URL strict smoke.
localRequiredEvidence: Next guarded build produces current startable artifacts
loopback hosted-route smoke passes against next start
deepest closure report blocks 100/public rollout without external proof
hardNonClaims: Do not claim hosted demo closed
Do not claim public P1 rollout allowed
Do not claim Node 24 verified when current process is not Node 24
notes: This policy intentionally separates local startable-runtime proof from public deployed proof. 99 local is allowed only as environment-scoped language; 100 requires external evidence.
